ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keefe for and with James Vorrises. James Frangos for Helen Marks. Aristotle (Art) Marks (Son) in propria persona.

Ms. O'Keefe addressed the issues regarding the duplication of fees as listed in the Examiner's notes. Mr. Vorrises stated the extent of services that he provided to Ms. Marks and explained the cell phone bill. Aristotle Marks stated the family had concerns with the Conservatorship as set forth on the record. The Court stated that it had reviewed the accounting and stated that Mr. Vorrises was doing an excellent job in the care of Ms. Marks. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
